title: Pamr
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Pamr.jpg]] |name=Pamr |homeworld=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]{{CSWECite|III|10|Pamr}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blonde]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I said no!"
"Your mouth says no, but your body wants the festival gift I have for you...|Pamr and Ilir Post|}} '''Pamr''' was a young [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] that was being harassed by [[Ilir Post]] and two of his friends, in the aftermath of a [[Harvest Festival]]. She was rescued by [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]], who not only thrashed all three young men, but reported their crime to [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]]. Rather than let Ilir be prosecuted, the [[agro-combine]] his father worked for, [[Allied Grain and Roughage]], coerced Fel to accept a place at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] and miss Ilir's trial. ==Appearances== *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']] {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|140|FEL 1-2|Baron Soontir Fel}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Pamr }} [[Category:Corellians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
